name: @gantry/runtime
description: Provider-neutral agent runtime. Lightweight, secure, customizable.
author: Gantry Contributors

scripts.build:examples: npm run typecheck --workspace @gantry/example-nextjs-workflows && npm run build --workspace @gantry/example-nextjs-workflows
scripts.copy:web: mkdir -p dist && rm -rf dist/ui && cp -R apps/web/dist dist/ui
scripts.build:runtime: npm run clean && npm run build:contracts && npm run build:sdk && npm run build:web && tsc && npm run copy:migrations && npm run copy:web && chmod +x dist/cli/index.js
scripts.build: npm run build:runtime && npm run build:examples
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:contracts && tsc --noEmit && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.test: npm run build:contracts && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: npm run build:contracts && vitest run -c vitest.unit.config.ts
scripts.test:integration: npm run build:contracts && vitest run -c vitest.integration.config.ts
scripts.test:integration:postgres: node scripts/require-postgres-integration-env.mjs && npm run build:contracts && vitest run -c vitest.integration.postgres.config.ts
scripts.test:integration:postgres:chaos: node scripts/require-postgres-integration-env.mjs && npm run build:contracts && vitest run -c vitest.integration.postgres.chaos.config.ts
scripts.test:integration:postgres:hot-path: node scripts/require-postgres-integration-env.mjs && npm run build:contracts && GANTRY_POSTGRES_HOT_PATH=1 vitest run -c vitest.integration.postgres.hot-path.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:contracts && vitest run -c vitest.e2e.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:postgres: node scripts/require-postgres-integration-env.mjs && npm run build:contracts && vitest run -c vitest.e2e.postgres.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:agent:hermetic: node scripts/require-postgres-integration-env.mjs && npm run build:contracts && vitest run -c vitest.agent-e2e.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:agent:turn: node scripts/require-postgres-integration-env.mjs && npm run build:contracts && vitest run -c vitest.agent-e2e.config.ts apps/core/test/agent-e2e/scenarios/haiku-turn.agent-e2e.test.ts
